task_completion.description: Navigate to the calendar or scheduling interface in LibreHealth EHR.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The main calendar view or scheduling grid is visible in the LibreHealth EHR web interface.

task_completion.description: Open the dialog or form to add a new calendar event.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An 'Add Event', 'New Appointment', or similar scheduling form/modal is open on the screen.

task_completion.description: Set the event type to a Non-Patient or Provider Event with no patient assigned.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The event category/type is set to 'Provider Event', 'Non-Patient', or similar, and any patient selection or search field is left completely blank.

task_completion.description: Enter 'Staff Meeting' as the event title.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'Staff Meeting' is typed into the title, reason, or description field of the event form.

task_completion.description: Set the start time to 4:00 PM (16:00) and the duration to 60 minutes.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The start time field shows '16:00' or '4:00 PM', and the duration field shows '60' (minutes) or the end time is set to '17:00' / '5:00 PM'.

task_completion.description: Save the event and verify it appears on the calendar.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The calendar grid shows a scheduled block titled 'Staff Meeting' occupying the 16:00 (4:00 PM) to 17:00 (5:00 PM) time slot.

integrity.description: The agent used the LibreHealth EHR web interface to create the event.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with a web browser (e.g., Firefox, Chrome) navigating the LibreHealth EHR GUI, rather than using scripts or API testing tools.

integrity.description: The agent did not use direct database commands to insert the event.
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows showing MySQL commands, database scripts, or phpMyAdmin interfaces are used to bypass the GUI.

integrity.description: The final event is genuinely rendered by the EHR software.
integrity.visual_evidence: The 'Staff Meeting' event appears naturally integrated into the LibreHealth calendar grid with standard UI styling, not as text pasted into an unrelated document or a manipulated DOM.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The event must be titled exactly 'Staff Meeting'. The start time must be 16:00 (4:00 PM). The duration must be exactly 60 minutes (ending at 17:00/5:00 PM). It must be a Non-Patient / Provider Event, meaning absolutely no patient is assigned to it.
